Petition For Order Modifying Trust

Petition For Order Modifying Trust
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Continued To Jun-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Suttle for Barbara Lee (Successor Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to modification of the Trust and explained the purpose for the changes being requested. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
